[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [svg](../fast-element.svg/index.html)

## svg() function

Transforms a template literal string into a ViewTemplate whose content is created in the SVG namespace.

**Signature:**

```typescript
svg: <TSource = any, TParent = any>(strings: TemplateStringsArray, ...values: TemplateValue<TSource, TParent>[]) => ViewTemplate<TSource, TParent>
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

strings


</td><td>

TemplateStringsArray


</td><td>

The string fragments that are interpolated with the values.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

values


</td><td>

[TemplateValue](../fast-element.templatevalue/)<!-- -->&lt;TSource, TParent&gt;\[\]


</td><td>

The values that are interpolated with the string fragments.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[ViewTemplate](../fast-element.viewtemplate/)<!-- -->&lt;TSource, TParent&gt;

## Remarks

Use this in place of the html helper for any template whose root nodes are SVG elements rendered inside an `svg` element, such as the item template of a repeat directive. The template must not include the `svg` element itself.
